channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: The greatest keyboard never sold
item.description: Even as the latest phones and wearables tout speech recognition with unprecedented accuracy and spatial computing products flirt with replacing tablets and laptops, physical keyboards remain beloved for their efficiency. Earlier this year, for example, sci-fi novelist Robert J.
item.dc:creator: Ross Rubin, Fast Company

item.title: Xerox Acquires Lexmark for $1.5 Billion, Strengthening Position in Enterprise Market
item.description: Xerox acquires Lexmark in a deal valued at $1.5 billion, creating a new global printer giant and strengthening its position in the enterprise market.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: WinGet: The best way to keep Windows apps updated
item.description: For more than two years, I’ve been working with WinGet daily to monitor and maintain the apps on my Windows 10 and 11 PCs. For those not already in the know, WinGet is the built-in, command-line interface to Microsoft’s Windows Package Manager service.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Russian hosting firm RUVDS takes server tech to the South Pole for high-speed data tests in extreme conditions
item.description: Exploring high-speed data at the world’s coldest frontier, RUVDS aims for Antarctic breakthrough after North Pole test.
item.dc:creator: udinmwenefosa@gmail.com (Efosa Udinmwen), TechRadar

item.title: Looking for small drones? Listen for the right radio signals
item.description: The recent spate of unidentified drone sightings in the U.S., including some near sensitive locations such as airports and military installations, has caused significant public concern. Some of this recent increase in activity may be related to a September 2023 change in U.S.
item.dc:creator: The Conversation, Fast Company

item.title: Trump taps Sriram Krishnan for AI advisor role amid strategic shift in tech policy
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has tapped Sriram Krishnan, a seasoned entrepreneur and former Andreessen Horowitz partner, as the Senior Policy Advisor for Artificial Intelligence within the White House Office of Science and Technology Policy.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Why Big Tech is funding Trump's inauguration
item.description: Hefty donations from tech companies and leaders to President-elect Trump’s inaugural fund are a sign of Silicon Valley’s shifting relationship with the incoming leader after past tensions.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: NASA's Parker Solar Probe aims to fly closer to the sun like never before
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A NASA spacecraft aims to fly closer to the sun than any object sent before. The Parker Solar Probe was launched in 2018 to get a close-up look at the sun. Since then, it has flown straight through the sun's corona: the outer atmosphere visible during a total solar eclipse.
item.dc:creator: ADITHI RAMAKRISHNAN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Scholz dismisses Musk's assertion that only a far-right party can 'save' Germany
item.description: BERLIN (AP) — Chancellor Olaf Scholz on Friday dismissed an assertion by Elon Musk that only a far-right party can “save Germany,” but said that freedom of opinion "also goes for multibillionaires.” Germany is expected to vote in an early election on Feb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: How to perform a clean install in Windows 10 and 11
item.description: One key technique in the Windows repair playbook involves wiping out everything on the storage device (typically C:\) from which Windows boots and on which that OS resides. Prosaically enough, this device is often called the boot/system drive or disk.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 12 eye-opening Google Android app tricks from 2024
item.description: We talk about tons of tips for making the most of Android and tapping into all the operating system’s easily overlooked options, features, and shortcuts. But when it comes to real-world productivity, Google’s actual operating system is really only half the story.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Amazon workers are striking at multiple facilities. Here's what you should know
item.description: Amazon workers affiliated with the Teamsters union are on strike for a second day at seven of the company’s delivery hubs just days before Christmas.
item.dc:creator: Haleluya Hadero, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Ireland’s AI data centers are sucking up too much of the country’s energy
item.description: Ireland is still heavily reliant on burning fossil fuels to generate electricity, despite a growing number of wind farms sprouting across the countryside. Further data center expansion threatens Ireland's goals to sharply cut planet-warming emissions.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Apple complains Meta requests risk privacy in spat over EU efforts to widen access to iPhone tech
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Apple complained that requests from Meta Platforms for access to its operating software threaten user privacy, in a spat fueled by the European Union's intensifying efforts to get the iPhone maker to open up to products from tech rivals.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Create searchable Bluesky bookmarks with R
item.description: The Bluesky social network is seeping into the mainstream, thanks in part to people unhappy with changes at X (formerly Twitter). “It’s not some untouched paradise, but it’s got a spark of something refreshing,” Jan Beger, global head of AI Advocacy at GE HealthCare, posted on LinkedIn last month.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Data on animal movements help Hungarian researchers create a swarm of autonomous drones
item.description: BUDAPEST, Hungary (AP) — Moving in a dense cloud, like throngs of people walking across a crowded public square, 100 drones maneuver through the night sky in Hungary's capital, the result of over a decade of research and experimentation that scientists believe could change the future of unmanned fli
item.dc:creator: JUSTIN SPIKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: FBI warning: Don't point lasers at mysterious drones
item.description: According to the FBI, pilots of manned aircraft are increasingly in danger of being blinded by lasers.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, NewsNation

item.title: Musk and Trump are viewed roughly the same by Americans, an AP-NORC poll finds
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Elon Musk, clad in tuxedo and black tie, took the stage at President-elect Donald Trump's Mar-a-Lago resort shortly after the election with all the swagger of the winning candidate himself. “The public has given us a mandate that could not be more clear, the clearest mandate.
item.dc:creator: THOMAS BEAUMONT, SARAH PARVINI and AMELIA THOMSON-DEVEAUX, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: EU investigates TikTok over Romanian presidential election safeguards
item.description: LONDON (AP) — European Union regulators said Tuesday they're investigating whether TikTok breached the bloc's digital rulebook by failing to deal with risks to Romania's presidential election, which has been thrown into turmoil over allegations of electoral violations and Russian meddling.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC
